commentary: Shami to Rahane,  1 run | fullish and shaping away outside off. Rahane opens his bat face and runs it down to deep backward point
Shami to Allen, no run | oh!
Shami to Allen, no run | this is superb bowling!
Shami to Allen, no run | wow!
Shami to Allen,  1 run | back of a length outside off. Allen goes fishing at it away from his body and edges it down to deep third
Shami to Rahane, FOUR runs | Rahane with a rasping riposte!
Prince Yadav to Allen, FOUR runs | Allen with his first boundary too!
Prince Yadav to Allen, 1 wide | spears it down leg first up but the ball swings back towards Pant after passing the batter. He does well to get a glove to it
Prince Yadav to Allen, FOUR runs | four more!
Prince Yadav to Allen, no run | full on middle and off, and shaping away. Allen jams down on it and slices it towards extra cover
Prince Yadav to Allen, OUT | goes a mile up, and taken on the fence!
Prince Yadav to A Raghuvanshi,  1 run | back of a length outside off. Raghuvanshi gets up on his toes and dabs it down to deep backward point
Prince Yadav to Rahane, no run | back of a length outside off. Rahane hangs back and pushes it towards cover point
Shami to A Raghuvanshi, no run | full and wide outside off. Raghuvanshi reaches out for it and scuffs it towards extra cover
Shami to A Raghuvanshi, no run | length outside off. Raghuvanshi gets a half stride in and punches it on the up towards cover point
Shami to A Raghuvanshi, no run | back of a length outside off. Skids through and Raghuvanshi chalks it off the toe-end towards slip
Shami to A Raghuvanshi, FOUR runs | take that, says the youngster!
Shami to A Raghuvanshi, no run | back of a length, zoning into leg stump. Raghuvanshi stays further leg side before tapping it into the off side
Shami to A Raghuvanshi,  1 run | slower ball on a full length outside off. Raghuvanshi drills it to mid on, where Rathi sprawls to his left and saves a certain boundary
Siddharth to A Raghuvanshi, no run | fired in on a back of a length on middle and off. Raghuvanshi stays back and jabs it into the off side
Siddharth to Rahane, no run | back of a length on middle and off. Rahane lets the ball come to him before stabbing it to square leg
Siddharth to A Raghuvanshi, 2 wide | sprayed down leg. Raghuvanshi misses his flick and Pant fumbles too, allowing a couple of extras
Siddharth to Rahane,  SIX runs | magnificent from the skipper!
Siddharth to Rahane,  1 run | darted in again, on a back of a length on off. Rahane bunts it to mid on and saunters across to the other end
Siddharth to A Raghuvanshi, no run | back of a length just outside off. Raghuvanshi stands up tall and punches it towards cover point
Siddharth to A Raghuvanshi, no run | pushed in again, on a length on middle and leg. Raghuvanshi has a hoick at it and squirts it off the inside edge towards short fine. That was bowled at 111.4kph!
Rathi to Rahane, no run | dragged down outside off but Rahane cannot cash in. Scuffed into the off side
Rathi to Rahane, no run | much fuller outside off. Rahane stretches forward before turning it towards square leg
Rathi to Rahane, no run | oh, almost a wicket!
Rathi to Rahane, FOUR runs | up and over!
Rathi to Rahane, FOUR runs | more runs for Rahane!
Rathi to Rahane,  2 runs | darted in full on middle and off. Rahane flicks it to long on's right and has enough time to canter back for two
Avesh Khan to A Raghuvanshi, no run | back of a length outside off and this skips through. Raghuvanshi shapes for the cut but is beaten for pace
1lb | Avesh Khan to A Raghuvanshi, 1 leg bye
Avesh Khan to Rahane,  1 run | low full toss outside off. Rahane laces his cover drive but Choudhary at extra cover sprawls to his right to save three. Rahane will feel he missed out there
Avesh Khan to A Raghuvanshi, FOUR runs | nicely done!
Avesh Khan to A Raghuvanshi,  SIX runs | Raghuvanshi goes all the way now!
Avesh Khan to A Raghuvanshi, FOUR runs | through the gap now - this is excellent batting!
Siddharth to Rahane,  1 run | angled in full on the pads. Rahane eases it out to deep mid wicket
Siddharth to A Raghuvanshi,  2 runs | slanted in on a length on off. Raghuvanshi comes forward and drives it on the up past extra cover. Back for a brace
Siddharth to A Raghuvanshi, FOUR runs | the runs continue to flow!
Siddharth to A Raghuvanshi,  1 run | back of a length on off. Raghuvanshi hangs back and dabs it towards backward point, who slides to his left and ensures it is just a single
Siddharth to Rahane,  1 run | back of a length on the pads. Rahane glances it to short fine leg and keeps things ticking
Siddharth to A Raghuvanshi, no run | fullish on middle and off. Raghuvanshi comes forward and punches it straight to extra cover
Rathi to Rahane,  1 run | carrom ball on a full length outside off. Rahane comes forward and knocks it to long off
1lb | Rathi to A Raghuvanshi, 1 leg bye
Rathi to Rahane, FOUR runs | what timing!
Rathi to Rahane,  1 run | fullish on middle and leg. Rahane dinks it into the mid wicket region and picks up a single
Rathi to A Raghuvanshi,  1 run | dragged down outside off. Raghuvanshi waits for it before jabbing it towards sweeper cover
Rathi to Rahane,  1 run | slanted in on a length on off. Stops in the surface and Rahane plonks it uppishly past the bowler
Avesh Khan to Rahane,  SIX runs | bat goes one way, ball goes the other! But it does not matter where the bat has gone because the ball has landed beyond the ropes!
Avesh Khan to Rahane,  1 run | fuller but similarly wide outside off. Rahane drills it out towards deep point
Avesh Khan to A Raghuvanshi,  2 runs | leg-cutter on a back of a length on off. Raghuvanshi stabs it into the spaces between long on and deep mid wicket, and hares back for a brace
Avesh Khan to A Raghuvanshi,  SIX runs | into the stands, almost!
Avesh Khan to A Raghuvanshi, no run | full outside off. Raghuvanshi plants his front foot and powers it straight to extra cover
Avesh Khan to A Raghuvanshi, no run | slower ball on a back of a length outside off. Raghuvanshi hangs back and jabs it towards backward point
Prince Yadav to Rahane,  1 run | shortish on middle and leg. Rahane uses the angle and helps it down to fine leg
Prince Yadav to A Raghuvanshi, no run | into the blockhole on middle and off. Raghuvanshi jams down on it and digs it out towards the bowler
Prince Yadav to A Raghuvanshi, 1 wide | banged in so short that Prince's toe-nails were in danger for a moment. Slides down leg harmlessly and called a wide
Prince Yadav to A Raghuvanshi,  1 run | back of a length on middle and leg. Raghuvanshi gets inside the line and glances it down to long leg
Prince Yadav to Rahane,  1 run | slower ball on a length just outside off. Rahane pokes it into the mid on region and picks up another single
Prince Yadav to A Raghuvanshi, FOUR runs | another loose ball and put away!
Prince Yadav to A Raghuvanshi,  1 run | dug in short on middle and off, and this gets a little big on the batter. Tugged towards deep square leg
Rathi to A Raghuvanshi,  1 run | length on middle and off. Raghuvanshi pats it enough to extra cover's left for a single
Rathi to Rahane, OUT | has that carried?! Looks like it has, and Shami throws away the ball to the umpire rather nonchalantly! Rahane asked to wait, though!
Rathi to Green, no run | incoming ball, on a back of a length on middle. Green reads it off the pitch and prods it into the on side
Rathi to Green,  1 run | googly on a fuller length outside off. Green plants his front foot and drills it to long off to open his account
Rathi to A Raghuvanshi,  1 run | leg-cutter, on a length on middle and off. Raghuvanshi opens his bat face slightly and punches it towards deep point
Rathi to Green,  1 run | fired in full on leg. Green eases it to long on and keeps strike
Siddharth to Green,  1 run | on a length just outside off. Straightens a touch and Green pushes it to sweeper cover
Siddharth to A Raghuvanshi,  1 run | angled in fuller on leg. Raghuvanshi gets down on one knee and sweeps it towards deep backward square leg
Siddharth to Green,  1 run | darted in on a length on the pads. Green tucks it towards deep backward square leg
Siddharth to A Raghuvanshi, OUT | holes out to long on, and LSG's spinners are applying the squeeze!
Siddharth to Rinku Singh,  1 run | length ball on the pads. Rinku stabs it to deep mid wicket and gets off the mark
Siddharth to Green, no run | back of a length on middle and leg. Green hangs back before playing it towards the bowler
Shami to Rinku Singh,  1 run | back of a length on middle and off. Rinku steps down and swishes at it, only to squirt it off the inside edge towards the keeper
Shami to Green,  1 run | low full toss just outside off. Green gets his bat down in time and pushes it to long off
Shami to Rinku Singh,  1 run | back of a length outside off. Rinku uses the pace and runs it down to deep third
Shami to Green,  1 run | slower ball on a back of a length just outside off. Green taps it into the pitch and the ball bounces up over Shami, allowing a single
Shami to Rinku Singh, no run | off-pace again, on a length just outside off. Rinku comes forward and pushes it towards extra cover
Shami to Rinku Singh,  1 run | low full toss outside off. Rinku throws his hands at it and drills it towards sweeper cover
Avesh Khan to Rinku Singh, no run | hard length just outside off. Rinku stays back and taps it towards extra cover
Avesh Khan to Rinku Singh, OUT | knocks him over with a ripper, and Rinku is outta here!

Avesh Khan to Powell, no run | banged into the track outside off. Powell gets into an awkward position and his bat ends up acting like a periscope. Clinked back to the bowler, who then fires a throw into Powell. Avesh runs up to offer a hand of apology immediately after
Avesh Khan to Powell, no run | another bumper and this skips through sharply on leg. Powell is late on the short-arm-pull and the ball whistles past his blade
Avesh Khan to Powell, no run | almost a chop-on!
Avesh Khan to Powell,  1 run | fuller and wider outside off. Powell reaches out for it and shanks it down the ground to long on. Just a run off the 14th, and that was superb from Avesh!
Rathi to Powell,  1 run | dragged down on middle and leg. Powell rocks back and heaves it towards deep square leg
Rathi to Green, no run | back of a length on leg. Straightens a little and Green gets squared up. Prods it back to the bowler eventually
Rathi to Green, no run | back of a length on middle and off. Green continues to read Rathi off the pitch but can do nothing more than defend
Rathi to Green, no run | carrom ball on a back of a length on middle and leg. Green goes right back and plays the textbook back-foot defence...
Rathi to Green,  1 run | carrom ball on a back of a length on the pads. Green knocks it to long on
Rathi to Powell,  1 run | leg-cutter on a length outside off. Powell plays it late and opens his bat face to guide it past the slip. Retains strike
Siddharth to Powell,  SIX runs | Powell has had enough of the pushing and prodding!
Siddharth to Powell, no run | into the blockhole on middle and leg. Powell cannot do much with it and clinks it back to the bowler
Siddharth to Powell, FOUR runs | streaky but Powell will take it!
Siddharth to Powell, no run | into the stumps at the other end, but Green is safe!
Siddharth to Powell,  1 run | darted in fuller on middle and leg. Powell tucks it off his toes towards deep mid wicket
Siddharth to Green,  1 run | pulls the length back on leg after seeing the batter advance. Green punches it to long off and keeps strike
Prince Yadav to Green,  1 run | excellent yorker, honing into middle and off. Green jams down on it and squeezes it out into the off side
Prince Yadav to Powell,  1 run | low full toss zoning into off. Powell cannot get under it and digs it out towards long off
Prince Yadav to Green, FOUR runs | Green gets one away, finally!
Prince Yadav to Green,  1 run | low full toss on middle and leg. Green tugs it off the inside edge into his pad and has to settle for a single yet again
Prince Yadav to Powell, FOUR runs | watch out, bowler and umpire!
Prince Yadav to Powell,  SIX runs | fetch that too, says Rovman!
Avesh Khan to Green,  1 run | on a length outside off. Green tries to smash it into next week and chunks it off the inside edge into the on side
Avesh Khan to Powell,  2 runs | banged in short on middle and off. Powell a little rushed on the pull and he cloths it towards deep square leg. Mistimes it so badly that he can come back for two
Avesh Khan to Powell, FOUR runs | Powell continues to motor along!
Avesh Khan to Powell,  1 run | another low full toss outside off. Powell cannot get under this and shanks it to long on
Avesh Khan to Powell, 1 wide | full and a mile outside off. Left alone by Powell and called a wide

Avesh Khan to Green, no run | banged in short outside off. Green leaps into the air and swishes at it, only to connect with the fresh Kolkata air. Not called a wide but Green wants to review. This could be touch-and-go. The top of Green's head is measured at 2.03m. Ball passing through at 2.01m. But the third umpire now wants to check the direction too. Inside the tramlines, so KKR lose a review!
Avesh Khan to Green, FOUR runs | Green muscles his way to another boundary!
1lb | Shami to Powell, 1 leg bye
Shami to Green,  SIX runs | Green lays into this, and it goes a mile!
Shami to Green,  1 run | right up in the blockhole on the stumps. Green drills it back past the bowler but he has to settle for a single as long off reins it in

Shami to Green, 1 wide | another short ball outside off and this seems to sail above the batter's head again. Green jumps up, throws his hands at it and misses. Green reviews again, arguing it should be a wide. This seemed to be above his head. 2.03m is the magic mark, and the ball is above it.
Shami to Powell,  1 run | brilliant yorker, zoning into leg stump. Powell stabs it off the inside edge into his pads, and the ball dribbles away into the off side for a single
Shami to Green,  1 run | brilliant yorker on middle and off. Green squeezes it out to backward point. Powell says yes to the single and scampers across
Shami to Powell,  1 run | top yorker again, tailing into the pads. Powell tucks it off his toes towards deep mid wicket
Prince Yadav to Powell, FOUR runs | smart, smart batting!
Prince Yadav to Powell,  1 run | into the blockhole outside off. Powell cannot get under it and clinks it to the fielder stationed right behind the umpire

Prince Yadav to Powell, 1 wide | banged in short outside off and this skips well over the bowler's head. Powell swipes at it and misses. Wide called this time. And LSG review now. Surely this cannot be a legal delivery?! Top of Powell's head is measured at 1.83m. Ball passes at 1.9m, and the wide call stays!
Prince Yadav to Green, FOUR runs | more streaky runs, but KKR will not care an iota!
Prince Yadav to Green,  1 run | low full toss on middle and leg. Green tugs it towards deep mid wicket
Prince Yadav to Powell, no run | oh!
Prince Yadav to Powell, 1 bye | off-pace and dug into the track just outside off. Powell swings like a rusty gate and swats away flies. Green pinches a bye, and KKR finish with 181!
